description.en: Return a memoryview of the memory area underlying this buffer. The returned object is a one-dimensional, C-contiguous memoryview with format B (unsigned bytes). BufferError is raised if the buffer is neither C- nor Fortran-contiguous.

description.en: Special reducer that can be defined in Pickler subclasses. This method has priority over any reducer in the dispatch_table. It should conform to the same interface as a __reduce__() method, and can optionally return NotImplemented to fallback on dispatch_table-registered reducers to pickle obj. For a detailed example, see Custom Reduction for Types, Functions, and Other Objects. Added in version 3.8.

description.en: Release the underlying buffer exposed by the PickleBuffer object.
